# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

class Report {
    private $pdo;

    public function __construct(PDO $db) {
        $this->pdo = $db;
    }

    public function getReports($start_date, $end_date, $status, $category) {
        $query = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE 1=1";

        if ($start_date && $end_date) {
            $query .= " AND date BETWEEN :start_date AND :end_date";
        }

        if ($status) {
            $query .= " AND status = :status";
        }

        if ($category) {
            $query .= " AND category = :category";
        }

        $stmt = $this->pdo->prepare($query);
        $stmt->bindValue(':start_date', $start_date);
        $stmt->bindValue(':end_date', $end_date);
        $stmt->bindValue(':status', $status);
        $stmt->bindValue(':category', $category);
        $stmt->execute();

        return $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_OBJ);
    }
}

$db = new PDO("mysql:host=localhost;dbname=mydb", "username", "password");

$report = new Report($db);

// Get user-selected filters from $_POST
$start_date = $_POST['start_date'];
$end_date = $_POST['end_date'];
$status = $_POST['status'];
$category = $_POST['category'];

$reports = $report->getReports($start_date, $end_date, $status, $category);
